Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Neglected Alignment Ideas Survey

A Next.js survey app for collecting AI alignment research ideas.

Features:
- Multi-idea submission \(add unlimited ideas in one session\)
- Contact info entered once, used for all ideas
- Real-time validation with character count feedback
- Google Sheets integration for data storage
- localStorage persistence for drafts
- Clean, minimalist design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
